decks.notes: This deck aims to lock down the opponent with a combination of powerful artifacts like Trinisphere and Karn, the Great Creator, while also generating mana advantage with cards like Grim Monolith and Urza's lands. The win condition revolves around powerful threats like Ugin, Eye of the Storms and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn. The synergy between artifacts and control elements allows the player to control the game and outvalue the opponent through card advantage and board presence. The deck seeks to disrupt the opponent's strategy and overwhelm them with a strong late-game.

The deck focuses on quickly cycling through the deck by casting a large number of low-cost spells to reanimate key creatures from the graveyard and win the game in a single explosive turn. By utilizing cards like Dark Ritual, Lotus Petal, and Cabal Ritual, the deck aims to cast spells rapidly to fill the graveyard with creatures like Boggart Trawler and Narcomoeba. Once the pieces are in place, the deck can use Dread Return to bring back powerful creatures like Thassa's Oracle and win the game instantly. The deck is designed to be fast, efficient, and deadly in its execution.

The main concept of this deck is to establish control over the game by using artifacts to create a prison-like lock on the opponent. The deck focuses on using cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Planar Nexus to disrupt the opponent's strategy while also utilizing cards like Urza's Saga and Grim Monolith for mana acceleration. By combining a variety of artifacts and lock pieces, the deck aims to control the game and eventually win through powerful threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn or Ugin, the Spirit Dragon.

The key concept of this deck is to maintain tempo and pressure on the opponent by playing aggressive creatures like Delver of Secrets and Dragon's Rage Channeler, while disrupting their game plan with cards like Daze and Force of Will. The deck aims to control the board with efficient removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Wasteland, while digging for additional threats and answers with card draw spells like Ponder and Brainstorm. By utilizing a combination of aggression and disruption, the deck aims to quickly close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on utilizing the cascade mechanic to cast powerful spells for free, while also controlling the board with counter spells. By cycling through cards like Street Wraith and Curator of Mysteries, the player can quickly assemble combos like Living End to bring back powerful creatures from the graveyard. With a mix of disruptive elements like Force of Will and Endurance, as well as big creatures like Colossal Skyturtle and Oliphaunt, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of speed, control, and threats.

The main concept of this Mardu Aggro deck is to use efficient creatures like Amped Raptor and Orcish Bowmasters along with disruption like Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy to control the board and pressure the opponent. The deck also includes powerful cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory to finish off the opponent quickly. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive strategy, with cards like Wasteland and Karakas to disrupt the opponent's lands. Overall, this deck aims to be fast, disruptive, and overwhelming in order to secure a victory.

The main concept of this Legacy Control-Stiflenought deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's game plan while deploying powerful threats like Phyrexian Dreadnought and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. Utilizing spells like Force of Will, Stifle, and Swords to Plowshares to control the board state and protect key cards, while also utilizing powerful card draw and selection tools like Brainstorm and Nulldrifter. The deck also includes disruptive lands like Wasteland to further hinder the opponent's resources. Overall, the deck aims to control the game and win through powerful threats and disruption.

This UR Tempo deck focuses on quickly deploying threats like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent while controlling the board with counterspells and removal spells like Lightning Bolt. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with efficient creatures and burn spells. Utilizing cantrips like Ponder and Brainstorm helps ensure consistent draws and optimal card selection, while cards like Prismari Charm offer flexibility in dealing with various threats. The deck's streamlined game plan revolves around maintaining tempo and overwhelming the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy.

The deck focuses on utilizing powerful artifacts to control the game and lock down the opponent's options. Cards like Urza's Saga, Candelabra of Tawnos, and The One Ring provide strong utility and advantage. Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms offer additional control elements. Planar Nexus and Trinisphere disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck seeks to establish a prison-like board state using powerful artifacts and control elements like Pithing Needle and Kozilek's Command. The goal is to slow the opponent down and ultimately overwhelm them with powerful threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn.

This deck revolves around locking down the opponent through a combination of artifacts and control cards. By utilizing cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Trinisphere, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy and prevent them from executing their game plan effectively. The inclusion of powerful artifacts like Urza's Saga and Grim Monolith allows for mana acceleration and additional utility, while cards like Kozilek's Command provide a flexible answer to various threats. Overall, the deck seeks to establish a strong prison-like board state that is difficult for the opponent to break out of.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier, then using reanimation spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead to bring them back into play for a devastating combo. Cards like Unmask and Thoughtseize help disrupt the opponent's game plan while cards like Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual provide the necessary mana acceleration. The deck also includes disruptive creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers to further control the game. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast and powerful reanimation strategies.

This deck focuses on casting multiple spells in a single turn to generate a large storm count, allowing the player to either win the game with Tendrils of Agony or Runehorn Hellkite, or use Burning Wish to access additional combo pieces from the sideboard. The deck includes several ways to generate mana quickly, protect the combo with counter magic, and refill the hand with cards like Echo of Eons and Brainstorm. The key strategy is to efficiently chain spells together to build up a lethal storm count and overwhelm the opponent in a single explosive turn.

The main concept of this Eldrazi Aggro deck is to quickly ramp up mana with cards like Ancient Tomb and Lotus Petal to play powerful Eldrazi creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Reality Smasher. Chalice of the Void is used to disrupt opponent's strategies, while cards like Glaring Fleshraker and Sire of Seven Deaths provide aggressive threats. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with fast, efficient creatures backed up by disruptive spells like Eldrazi Confluence and Kozilek's Command. The inclusion of cards like Wasteland and Wastescape Battlemage helps to control the opponent's mana base.

This aggro-affinity Legacy deck focuses on utilizing powerful artifact creatures and mana ramp to quickly overwhelm opponents. By combining fast mana acceleration with cheap creatures like Ornithopter and Pinnacle Emissary, the deck aims to flood the board and pressure opponents early in the game. Urza, Lord High Artificer and Emry, Lurker of the Loch provide additional value by recurring artifacts and generating extra mana. The inclusion of force of will allows for disruption, while Urza's Saga acts as a potent engine to tutor for key artifacts.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly set up and resolve the Doomsday combo, using various cards like Dark Ritual, Lotus Petal, and Lion's Eye Diamond to generate a large amount of mana. The goal is to stack the perfect five-card pile with Doomsday at the bottom and Thassa's Oracle on top, allowing you to win the game on the spot. The deck also includes disruption like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to protect the combo and interaction like Witherbloom Charm to handle opposing threats. It aims to win the game efficiently and decisively through precise planning and execution.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly get powerful creatures into the graveyard and then bring them back onto the battlefield using cards like Reanimate, Shallow Grave, and Animate Dead. This combo strategy allows for explosive plays, such as bringing back Griselbrand early in the game. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Unmask to protect the combo. The inclusion of Atraxa, Grand Unifier adds another powerful threat to the mix. Overall, the deck aims to quickly reanimate big creatures to overwhelm the opponent and secure a win.
